code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut has_num = false
  mut num = 0
  mut neg = false
  while i < n
    mut b = 0
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      b = v
    when None
      b = 0
    end
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      num = num * 10 + (b - 48)
      has_num = true
    else if b == 45 and not has_num
      neg = true
    else
      if has_num
        if neg
          result = list.push(result, 0 - num)
        else
          result = list.push(result, num)
        end
        has_num = false
        num = 0
        neg = false
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has_num
    if neg
      result = list.push(result, 0 - num)
    else
      result = list.push(result, num)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  let n = sorted.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut v = 0
    match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(val)
      v = val
    when None
      v = 0
    end
    if not inserted and x <= v
      result = list.push(result, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, v)
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn sort_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut v = 0
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(val)
      v = val
    when None
      v = 0
    end
    sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, v)
    i = i + 1
  end
  sorted
end

fn format_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  mut s = ""
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut v = 0
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(val)
      v = val
    when None
      v = 0
    end
    if i == 0
      s = "#{v}"
    else
      s = "#{s} #{v}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  s
end

mut line = ""
match io.read_line()
when Some(l)
  line = l
when None
  line = ""
end

let nums = parse_ints(line)
let sorted = sort_list(nums)
println(format_list(sorted))
